AdditionalAttributes.description:
DOVE BODY WASH REJUVENATE POMGRNTE&LMN VRBENA 1 LTR

If you’re looking for a body wash that is mild and gentle and cares for your skin, give Dove Fruity Nourish Body Wash a try. Developed with naturally derived cleansers and 0% sulfate SLES, this soap-free moisturising body wash works to cleanse and nourish your skin, leaving it soft and smooth in just one shower.

Our shower gel doesn’t strip away your skin’s natural moisture, keeping your skin hydrated and soft. It’s gentle on your microbiome (your skin’s living protective layer) and made with a plant-based moisturiser and ¼ moisturising cream, helping you turn every shower into an act of self-care.

Where an ordinary body wash might leave your skin feeling dry, tight and irritated, Dove leaves it feeling soft and cared for before you’ve even stepped out of the shower. It is also PETA Vegan Approved and comes in a 70% recycled plastic bottle.

Pump a generous amount of Dove Fruity Nourish Body Wash into wet hands, a washcloth or a loofah. Massage all over your body, then rinse off to reveal soft, smooth skin. Your skin is most receptive to lotions and serums when it’s slightly damp, making post-shower the perfect time to lock in moisture. Apply your favourite Dove moisturiser as soon as you step out of the shower – your skin will look and feel softer, as well as instantly more nourished.

At Dove, we envision a world where beauty is a source of confidence, not anxiety. Our mission is to help the next generation of women develop a positive relationship with the way they look – reaching over ¼ of a billion young people with self-esteem education by 2030.

Mild and caring, Dove Fruity Nourish Body Wash gently cleanses and provides nourishment for instantly soft, smooth skin

This body cleanser helps your skin retain its natural moisture rather than stripping it away

Produces a rich lather that doesn’t dry out your skin like ordinary body washes

Made with naturally derived gentle cleansers, 0% sulfate SLES and pomegranate juice for a fruity shower experience

Featuring a plant-based moisturiser and ¼ moisturising cream, our shower gel effectively washes away dirt while nourishing your skin’s microbiome

This microbiome-gentle body wash is PETA Vegan Approved and packaged in a 70% recycled plastic bottle, so you can feel good about switching to Dove

REXONA ANTIPERSPIRANT AEROSOL WOMEN ADVANCED SHOWER FRESH 220 ML

Rexona Women Shower Fresh Advanced Protection Antiperspirant Deodorant Aerosol provides 72 hours of non-stop sweat and odour protection – giving you the confidence to start moving and take on the day.

Our innovative MotionSense technology releases bursts of clean, invigorating fragrance when you need it most. It works like this: unique microcapsules sit on the surface of your skin. When you move, friction breaks those microcapsules, releasing more fragrance. So, the more you move, the more it protects. When you work hard, Rexona works harder. Grab this antiperspirant deodorant for women to get all-day freshness and 72-hour protection that works in sync with your body for non-stop confidence from morning to night. For optimum sweat protection, apply daily to clean and dry underarms. To use, shake well and spray 15 cm away from underarms, then you’re good to go. No need to reapply. Rexona gives you all the backup you need. Rexona. It won’t let you down.

As part of our efforts to move together for a sustainable future, we’re increasing our use of reusable materials and making it easier for you to recycle our packaging. Our deodorant spray is made in Australia with renewable grid electricity and comes in a recyclable aluminium can – please recycle when empty.

*ethyl alcohol
